# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Run a broader family scenario that needs cross-repo coordination rather than a thin local overlay.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The task needs a broader playbook or a different base workflow, not a thin atm10 overlay on the existing change protocol.
## Expected object
A deflection that says the request needs a broader playbook or a different base skill, not a thin atm10 overlay.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this overlay when the request expands beyond one bounded repo-local adaptation.
## Verification hooks
The response should reject scenario-level scope creep and avoid inventing a family doctrine.
